news.headline: Thousands rally in Belfast to condemn anti-immigrant rioting that followed stabbing
news.summary: Thousands of demonstrators gathered in Belfast on Saturday to denounce anti-immigrant rioters who set fire to homes and cars earlier in the week after a brutal stabbing blamed on an asylum seeker.

news.headline: Swiss cast ballots on right-wing's bid to cap country's population at 10 million
news.summary: Voters in Switzerland are casting final ballots Sunday on an initiative championed by the top right-wing party to cap the rich Alpine country's population at 10 million.

news.headline: Shooting over property dispute in KP's Bannu kills 4 of same family
The Secrets of a Soccer-Turf Master
news.summary: John Sorochan, a turf scientist at the University of Tennessee, has led the yearslong, multimillion-dollar effort to develop perfect playing fields for the 2026 World Cup.

news.headline: Deadlocked Wars: How Major Powers Misread the Regions They Attacked
news.summary: Russia and the United States projected their own centralized views onto Ukraine and Iran, analysts said. As a result, the smaller countries trapped larger ones in a costly confrontation.

news.headline: Curaçao Is the Smallest Country Ever to Reach the World Cup
news.summary: Competing for the first time, Curaçao is brimming with joy. Most of the Caribbean nation’s team was born and raised in the Netherlands, but residents say the players represent them.

news.headline: Initiative tackles insurance barriers for autistic children in Hong Kong
news.summary:
Securing health insurance for her autistic son in Hong Kong proved distressing for homemaker Sarah*.
The 50-year-old said she approached several insurance companies over about three months, but none could assure her that her son, now 18, would be eligible for cover because of his condition.

news.headline: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
news.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.
